results.label: Base utilization screen
results.valueExpression: Base eligible throughput = 14110.00 t; utilization = 87.10% versus 75% minimum.
results.uncertaintyExpression: Fails if throughput, fit, or available hours deteriorate materially.

results.label: Downside utilization screen
results.valueExpression: Downside eligible throughput = 11700.00 t; downside utilization = 72.22% versus 68% minimum.
results.uncertaintyExpression: Sensitive to yield volatility, fit deterioration, and harvest-window compression.

results.label: Quality and market-fit screen
results.valueExpression: Base quality fit = 83.00%; downside quality fit = 78.00%; committed outlet share = 69.00%.
results.uncertaintyExpression: Requires tighter outlet and grade validation before any full appraisal use.

results.label: Working-capital and energy screen
results.valueExpression: Screening working-capital days = 52 versus 60 max; indicative energy cost = 19.70 EUR per eligible tonne.
results.uncertaintyExpression: Energy and funding terms remain screening inputs, not financing truth.

results.label: Pre-gate recommendation
results.valueExpression: Outcome = PROCEED_TO_FULL_APPRAISAL; indicative capex = 3400000.00 EUR (209.88 EUR per annual tonne of capacity).
results.uncertaintyExpression: Screening only. Not a final investment decision and not a full appraisal.

notes: Screening only. Not financing truth. Full external appraisal required before any final investment decision.
